summary: High‑quality audience tape praised as the second‑best sounding version of this unknown show.
review: The reviewer rates the recording four stars and calls it the "second best sounding version" of the performance, highlighting a very clear and well‑balanced audio capture. No specific musical moments or song performances are mentioned, so the show itself is left unassessed beyond the positive tone of the comment.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it gives a solid 4‑star rating and explicitly praises the sound quality; lacking musical detail keeps the overall rating moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the second best sounding version, indicating clear, well‑balanced audio despite being an audience source.
